commits: 93808cb8: feat(timer): implement delayed message sending feature
implementation_tasks_completed: Task 1.1: timer-constants.ts (MIN/MAX/STEP, TIMER_DELAYS, isValidTimerDelay, TIMER_STATUS, TimerStatus)
Task 1.2: DB migration v23 (timer_messages table, indexes, down function)
Task 1.3: timer-db.ts (CRUD: create, getByWorktree, getById, getPending, updateStatus, cancel, cancelByWorktree, getPendingCount)

Task 2.1: timer-manager.ts (globalThis, initTimerManager, stopAllTimers, scheduleTimer, cancelScheduledTimer, stopTimersForWorktree, getActiveTimerCount, getTimerWorktreeIds, executeTimer with CLIToolManager)
Task 3.1: Timer API route (POST/GET/DELETE with validation)
Task 4.3: resource-cleanup.ts integration (orphan detection with deletedTimerWorktreeIds)
Task 5.2: TimerPane.tsx (registration form, countdown, cancel, polling with visibilitychange)
design_decisions_implemented: [SEC-MF-001] Fixed-string error responses in API catch blocks
[IMP-C-003] No MAX_TIMERS_PER_WORKTREE check during initTimerManager restore
message: TDD implementation complete for Issue #534. All 12 tasks implemented. 56 new tests added (26 timer-constants, 18 timer-db, 12 timer-manager). Coverage 99%. All existing tests pass (5328/5328 + 7 skipped). ESLint 0 errors, TypeScript 0 errors.
